rationale: Deliberately underspecified — no prior conversation context, no named file or bug. Tests whether Ask mode asks a clarifying question or names a specific concrete candidate (the known users.js status-message bug) rather than silently guessing an unrelated file.

Broad, unscoped question on a repo with exactly one known intentional bug (users.js status message). Tests whether the model correctly narrows scope to the actual issue instead of inventing unrelated complaints.

No file is named or attached, and saas-api has ~112 files across 17 modules. Tests whether the model asks which file, or picks the most likely entry point (app.module.ts) and says so explicitly, rather than answering as if a file were obviously implied.

prompt: How can we make this faster?
rationale: Extremely broad optimization request with no target module/endpoint specified. Tests whether the model narrows to a specific, defensible area (e.g. search.rebuildSearchIndex, or list()/pagination patterns) instead of giving generic, unfounded advice.

prompt: Compare this project's routing approach to the other one.
rationale: References an unspecified 'other one' with no second project in scope for this single-fixture session. Tests whether the model flags the missing referent instead of fabricating a comparison against an imagined second project.
